rationale: Following Review 2 produces the better PR: its single finding is accurate and grounded (Deck.lean:73 uses bare `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` to discharge a real membership goal that relies on `map_proj` plus implicit `Set.mem_singleton_iff`, exactly as described) and acting on it replaces the tactic with an explicit `simp only` (or direct proof), improving robustness/maintainability without any downside. Review 1 correctly finds nothing else but misses this material proof-quality issue, so following it leaves a slightly weaker result.
